Professional Summary

Junior .NET Developer with hands-on experience building ASP.NET Core MVC and ASP.NET Core Web API applications. Strong foundation in C#, Entity Framework (EF) / LINQ, and SQL Server, with a focus on Clean Architecture, Repository Pattern, and scalable backend design. Comfortable collaborating in teams using Git/GitHub and delivering full-stack solutions.
Technical Skills
Programming Languages: C#, Java, SQL, JavaScript, Python, C, C++, HTML, CSS
Frameworks & Platforms: ASP.NET Core Web API, ASP.NET Core MVC, .NET Core, Entity Framework (EF), LINQ, Flutter
Databases: SQL Server, MySQL
Tools & Technologies: Git, GitHub, Visual Studio, Firebase, Power BI, Figma

Concepts: Object-Oriented Programming (OOP), Data Structures, Algorithms Analysis & Design, REST APIs, Clean Architecture, Repository Pattern, Role-Based Authorization, Authentication (ASP.NET Identity)

Projects
Church Management System — Flutter + ASP.NET Core Web API | GitHub
• Built a Flutter mobile app integrated with an ASP.NET Core Web API backend using REST principles.
• Implemented authentication with ASP.NET Identity and enforced role-based authorization to control access by user role.
• Structured the backend with Clean Architecture and the Repository Pattern to improve maintainability and separation of concerns.

• Developed an Android application in Java for real-time crash detection.
• Integrated a TensorFlow Lite model to detect accidents using smartphone sensor data for on-device inference.
